response.overview: Alt-J performs live on KEXP at the Triple Door as part of KEXP's VIP Club Concert series. Recorded September 27, 2012.  Songs: Intro Interlude I / Tessellate Something Good Dissolve Me Fitzpleasure Matilda Breezeblocks Bloodflood Hand-Made Taro  Host: Cheryl Waters Audio Engineer: Jake McLaughlin Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Shelly Corbett, Luke Knecht and Scott Holpainen Editing: Jim Beckmann
response.title: Alt-J - Full Performance (Live on KEXP)
